title: selinum verticillare
intro: Selinum verticillare, also known as fern-leaved celery, is a plant species in the carrot family Apiaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selinum verticillare include its ability to alleviate symptoms of various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Selinum verticillare include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
